## Summary

Describe the smallest useful change in this pull request.

## Linked issues

Use a closing keyword only when this PR should close the issue after merge.

- [ ] This PR is self-contained and does not need a tracking issue.
- [ ] Addresses #
- [ ] Fixes #

## Change type

- [ ] bug
- [ ] feature
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] design
- [ ] research
- [ ] test
- [ ] docs

## Scope

- [ ] The PR stays inside the scope described above.
- [ ] Behavior changes include tests or an explanation for why no test is needed.
- [ ] Documentation is updated when behavior, workflow, or project metadata changes.

## Validation

- [ ] `./mvnw test`
- [ ] Documentation or workflow-only change; JVM tests are not required.

## Notes

Add reviewer notes, follow-up work, screenshots, logs, or open questions.
